---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: "Have an idea to make this project better? Share it!"
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "help wanted"]
assignees: ""
---

## ✨ Feature Description
<!-- What feature would you like to see? Be as specific as possible. -->



## 🤔 Problem it Solves
<!-- What problem does this feature address? -->
<!-- Example: "As a beginner, I struggle to understand X because Y..." -->



## 💡 Proposed Solution
<!-- How would you implement this? (Don't worry if you're unsure — ideas are welcome!) -->



## 🌟 Why This Helps Beginners
<!-- Since this is a learning project, explain how this makes it better for learners. -->



## 🔗 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Did you consider any other approaches? -->



## 📋 Additional Context
<!-- Any mockups, references, or related issues? -->
